description: Korean advanced packaging and OSAT specialist. Global OSAT rank ~17. Pioneer in Fan-Out Panel Level Packaging (FO-PLP) technology - ahead of ASE in FO-PLP commercialization. Provides turnkey backend services from test to packaging. Two segments: semiconductor (packaging/test) and electronic materials. Key technologies: flip-chip bumping, FO-PLP for AI/HPC. Founded 1990, KOSDAQ listed 1999.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment for OSAT backend operations
_externalRelationships.notes: FO-PLP technology leader among Korean OSAT companies. FY2024 revenue: 464.3B KRW, operating profit 3.4B KRW (thin margin). Market cap: 410B KRW. Subsidiary Nepes Ark (330860.KQ) handles silicon components. 1-year stock return: +109.92%. Advancing in AI semiconductor packaging. As an OSAT company performing wafer probing and dicing operations, Nepes is a likely Accretech customer.

_metadata.dataSource: FnGuide, Nepes IR, ETNews, THE ELEC
